div.h2: Clean Detach on SIGINT: Signal Handler → Flag → detach_all()

div.p: WHY sa_flags = 0 (no SA_RESTART) With SA_RESTART: kernel auto-restarts waitpid after SIGINT → never returns EINTR → loop never sees g_interrupted. Without SA_RESTART: waitpid returns -1 / errno=EINTR immediately → next iteration checks g_interrupted → detach.

ul.li: Single atomic write to volatile sig_atomic_t

text.tspan: FOR each slot i in g_pid_map
